The '''mother''' of [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]] was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who managed to survive [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].

==Biography==
She fell in love with her [[Fable Astin's father|Padawan]] shortly before the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the two conceived a baby girl strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] whom they named [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable]]. Shortly after this, Fable's father was killed by a rival.<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />

The remainder of Fable's young life was spent on the run from the Empire. It was during this time that Fable developed a talent for hiding her emotions of fear and sadness. As an adolescent, Fable picked up a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and began to practice with it. Fable's mother was duly surprised, having found herself unable to sense her daughter's feelings.<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />

From that moment on, Fable's training began, and she was schooled in the art of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Meditation/Legends|meditation]] and several other remedial [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]. Eventually, Fable joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] assisting in sabotage missions against the Empire.<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />
